rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption reduces taxable values statewide, potentially triggering rapid-decline adjustments under §48.258(a). The commissioner may need rulemaking to address legislatively-caused declines versus other factors beyond board control.
quote: the commissioner shall adjust the taxable value of property in a school district that, due to factors beyond the control of the board of trustees, experiences a rapid decline in the tax base used in calculating taxable values in excess of four percent of the tax base used in the preceding year.
_note: Conflict is indirect: the proposed exemption increase could cause taxable-value declines exceeding 4% in some districts, activating this adjustment mechanism. No direct statutory contradiction, but operational interaction may require updated commissioner rules.
